fields.name: Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number that is copied from the Tracking Specification table, when a serial number information record is created.

fields.name: Variant Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the variant of the item on the line.

fields.name: Serial No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies this number from the Tracking Specification table when a serial number information record is created.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the serial no. information record.

fields.name: Blocked
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the related record is blocked from being posted in transactions, for example a customer that is declared insolvent or an item that is placed in quarantine.

fields.name: Comment
fields.tooltip: Specifies that a comment has been recorded for the serial number.

fields.name: Inventory
fields.tooltip: Specifies the inventory quantity of the specified serial number.

fields.name: Expired Inventory
fields.tooltip: Specifies the inventory of the serial number with an expiration date before the posting date on the associated document.
